# Data Source: okta_push_providers

Get a list of push providers from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_push_providers/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `type` (String) Filters push providers by `providerType`. Valid values: `APNS`, `FCM`.

### Read-Only

- `push_providers` (List of Object) The list of push providers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--push_providers))

<a id="nestedatt--push_providers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `push_providers`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `last_updated_date` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `provider_type` (String)
